code:
import io
import string
import list

fn join_strings(_ strs: List<String>) -> String
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < strs.len()
    let s = match strs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      ""
    end
    if i == 0
      result = s
    else
      result = "#{result} #{s}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)

  mut evens: List<String> = []
  mut odds: List<String> = []

  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if n % 2 == 0
      evens = list.push(evens, tok)
    else
      odds = list.push(odds, tok)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  print("evens=#{join_strings(evens)}")
  print("odds=#{join_strings(odds)}")
end
